posts.caption_en: Another lap around the sun, completed! Nearly a decade in Bali, camera in hand — feeling grateful for the people, the places, and sharing this world with my daughter 🌋🎂

posts.caption_en: The September Vietnam workshop is coming up — ten days through northern and central Vietnam, photographing harvest season in Mu Cang Chai, traditional villages and fishing communities. Small group, all experience levels welcome, link in bio 👨🏾‍🌾🇻🇳
